headline: ITA Investors: Watch These Two Events Over the Next 30 Days
summary: The iShares U.S. Aerospace & Defense ETF (NYSEARCA:ITA) is sitting on a 34% one-year gain heading into June, with shares at roughly $235 and $13.5 billion in net assets. Two events in the next four weeks will largely decide whether ITA keeps running: the Pentagon’s FY2027 budget moving through Congress, and the June 29 Honeywell ... ITA Investors: Watch These Two Events Over the Next 30 Days

headline: Qarbon Aerospace Appoints Duane Hawkins to Its Board of Directors
summary: RED OAK, Texas, June 09, 2026--Qarbon Aerospace, Inc. ("Qarbon" or the "Company"), a leading Tier-1 provider of advanced composite aerostructures and assemblies, is pleased to announce that Duane Hawkins has joined its Board of Directors. With a career spanning more than four decades across some of the most prominent names in aerospace and defense, Hawkins brings a wealth of experience and operational knowledge that strengthens Qarbon's leadership as the Company continues to grow and pursue new

headline: General Dynamics Corporation (GD): Among the Best Aerospace and Defense Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds
summary: General Dynamics Corporation (NYSE:GD) is among the 10 Best Aerospace and Defense Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds, with 62 hedge funds holding a stake in the company, according to Insider Monkey’s database for Q1 2026.
